Sample Recipe Post
Seafood
Butter-Steamed
King Crab Legs
Serves 2·15 min·Wild-Caught Alaska
Ingredients
  • 2 lbs King Crab legs, thawed
  • 4 tbsp unsalted butter
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 lemon, halved
  • Fresh flat-leaf parsley · Flaky sea salt
Method
1.Melt butter in a wide skillet over medium heat
2.Add garlic, cook 60 seconds until fragrant
3.Add crab legs, cover, steam 5–6 minutes
4.Finish with lemon squeeze and scattered parsley
Do not overcook — the crab is already cooked. You are only heating and flavoring it.
#AlaskanHarvestSeafood #KingCrab #WildCaughtSeafood #SeafoodRecipe #CoastalCooking

Butter-Steamed
King Crab Legs
Serves 2·15 min·Wild-Caught Alaska
◆
Ingredients
  • 2 lbs King Crab legs, thawed
  • 4 tbsp unsalted butter
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 lemon, halved
  • Flat-leaf parsley · Flaky sea salt
◆
Method
IMelt butter in wide skillet, medium heat
IIAdd garlic, cook 60 sec until fragrant
IIIAdd crab, cover, steam 5–6 minutes
IVFinish with lemon, parsley, flaky salt
Northern Tip
Crab arrives fully cooked — you're only heating and flavoring it. Do not overcook.
